changeSet.author: codex

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cms_block b JOIN cms_page p ON p.id = b.page_id WHERE p.page_key = 'about' AND b.block_key IN ('about.heroBanner', 'about.intro', 'about.cooperationBanner')
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT b.block_key) FROM cms_block b JOIN cms_page p ON p.id = b.page_id WHERE p.page_key = 'about' AND b.block_key IN ('about.heroBanner', 'about.intro', 'about.cooperationBanner')

changeSet.comment: Restore the intended About-page sequence and demote only the exact audited image-less ACTIVE product. Unknown dirty data is rejected by the following changeset instead of being guessed or silently rewritten.
changeSet.sql:
UPDATE cms_block b SET sort_order = CASE b.block_key WHEN 'about.heroBanner' THEN 10 WHEN 'about.intro' THEN 20 WHEN 'about.cooperationBanner' THEN 30 END FROM cms_page p WHERE p.id = b.page_id AND p.page_key = 'about' AND b.block_key IN ('about.heroBanner', 'about.intro', 'about.cooperationBanner');
UPDATE product p SET status = 'DRAFT' WHERE p.id = 45 AND p.sku = 'SKU-ADRIATICA-OLOLO-FAG-ACCESSORIES-ACCESSORY-A9717CA9' AND p.status = 'ACTIVE' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM media m WHERE m.product_id = p.id AND m.type = 'IMAGE' AND m.is_main = TRUE AND m.position = 0 );

changeSet.author: codex

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM product WHERE price < 0 OR stock_quantity < 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM media WHERE position < 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT product_id, type, position FROM media GROUP BY product_id, type, position HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ) duplicates
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM media WHERE is_main = TRUE AND (type <> 'IMAGE' OR position <> 0)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM product p WHERE p.status = 'ACTIVE' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM media m WHERE m.product_id = p.id AND m.type = 'IMAGE' AND m.is_main = TRUE AND m.position = 0 )
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cms_block WHERE sort_order < 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT page_id, sort_order FROM cms_block GROUP BY page_id, sort_order HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ) duplicates

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_constraint c JOIN pg_class t ON t.oid = c.conrelid WHERE t.relname = 'cms_block' AND c.contype = 'f' AND c.confdeltype = 'n' AND c.conname IN ( 'fk_cms_block_media', 'fk_cms_block_media_kz', 'fk_cms_block_media_en', 'fk_cms_block_mobile_media', 'fk_cms_block_mobile_media_kz', 'fk_cms_block_mobile_media_en' )

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_constraint WHERE conname IN ( 'chk_product_price_nonnegative', 'chk_product_stock_nonnegative', 'chk_media_position_nonnegative', 'uk_media_product_type_position', 'chk_media_main_image_position', 'chk_cms_block_sort_order_nonnegative', 'uk_cms_block_page_sort_order' )
